acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-array registries.groups, registries.projects, or registries.milestones.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The export envelope validation now requires registry collections to be arrays, and the malformed registry collections smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects blank or duplicate registries.milestones[].name values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Milestone names are trimmed and checked for nonblank values and duplicates; the duplicate milestone smoke records a repeated name failing.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects duplicate or non-integer registries.milestones[].rank values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Milestone ranks are checked for integer type and duplicate rank values; bad-rank and duplicate-rank smokes record the expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects registries.milestones[].created_at values other than 1970-01-01T00:00:00.000Z.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Milestone created_at values are fixed to the deterministic export timestamp; the bad-created-at smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-null nodes[].milestone values that do not match a registered milestone name.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Node milestones are checked against registered milestone names while null remains allowed; the unknown-node-milestone smoke records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The qd report check evidence records the stricter checker passing against the current export and report set.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The change is limited to repository qd metadata validation and does not claim product or platform runtime behavior.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
